authorization: User grants permission in all cases to migrate conversations between any user-controlled accounts.
scope: persistent Claude, Codex, and agy conversation routing in this campaign
invariants: preserve the conversation UUID and role identity
securely migrate the provider-side local session store before registry adoption or dispatch
use no-clobber copies and verify content hashes
record source and destination profiles plus migration evidence
never use migration to consume a protected reset credit
never concurrently dispatch the same conversation from two account homes
